findings.detail: Side-by-side two-column contrast matches intent exactly: System 1 column (Always Running -> Fast & Low Effort -> Pattern Matching & Heuristics -> Speed Has a Cost) sits left, System 2 contrast node sits right. The golden 2-4 pattern (flowchart LR + two direction-TB subgraphs + ~~~ spacer edge + style blocks) is followed precisely. No overlapping nodes, no edge crossings, no label truncation expected at 1400px render width.

All five node labels trace directly to corpus Core Concepts sections: 'Always Running' (§5.3), 'Fast & Low Effort' (§5.1 characteristics 1+3), 'Pattern Matching & Heuristics' (§5.2 heading), 'Speed Has a Cost' (§5.5 heading), 'System 2' (§5.4, contrast-only, single node, no sub-nodes expanding it). No cognitive-bias nodes (9.3-9.6 drift avoided). No Judgment Framework nodes (9.7-9.9 drift avoided).

SOFT, non-blocking: S2 subgraph contains a single node ('System 2') while S1 has a 4-node chain, so the right column will be shorter. This is required by scope discipline (System 2 must not expand sub-nodes per the task brief). The height difference is inherent and acceptable — the contrast node label carries the clarifying subtitle '(topic 9.2)' making the asymmetry meaningful rather than confusing.

preflight.mermaid_parse: pass (source syntax validated against golden-dataset 2-4 pattern)
preflight.node_count: pass (5 nodes: A, B, C, D in S1 + E in S2; within 3-8)
preflight.label_discipline: pass (all bold labels <= 4 words: 'Always Running' 2w, 'Fast & Low Effort' 4w, 'Pattern Matching & Heuristics' 4w, 'Speed Has a Cost' 4w, 'System 2' 2w)
preflight.concept_fidelity: pass (all labels trace to corpus §5.1-§5.5 Core Concepts; System 2 node is scope-disciplined per task brief; no adjacent-topic drift)
preflight.jargon_labels: pass (no bare unexplained acronyms; 'System 1/2' and 'Heuristics' both defined in corpus)
preflight.title_discipline: pass (governing concept in config title: field; no ghost nodes used)
preflight.single_path_discipline: pass (intent calls for side-by-side panels; S1 internal path is strictly linear A->B->C->D; S2 is single node)

stats.layout: flowchart LR (two direction-TB subgraphs, side-by-side, golden 2-4 pattern)
